name: GIGABYTE B550M GAMING X WIFI6 Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket AM4 - Supports DDR4-3200 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 1 x PCIe 3.0 x4 - 2x M.2 Slots - DisplayPort 1.4 - HDMI 2.1 - USB 3.2 Gen1 Type-A - Realtek GbE LAN - 802.11ax Wi-Fi 6 - Bluetooth 5.3
shortName: GIGABYTE B550M GAMING X WIFI6 Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket AM4
description: Budget-friendly AM4 micro-ATX motherboard with PCIe 4.0 and Wi-Fi 6 for entry-level gaming builds.
